lint_issues.message: import pickle — module unused in the file
lint_issues.suggestion: Remove pickle or use it within the codebase

lint_issues.message: Multiple imports on one line: import sqlite3, pickle, subprocess
lint_issues.suggestion: Split into separate lines: import sqlite3 / import pickle / import subprocess
Never read — dead code. Remove or move to environment variable

lint_issues.message: SQL injection — f-string query concatenation: f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{username}'"
lint_issues.suggestion: Use parameterized query: conn.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?', (username,))
Use json.load() or a safe serialization format

lint_issues.message: subprocess.call(f"echo {cmd}", shell=True) — command injection via f-string with shell=True
divide(a, b): return a / b — no zero-division guard
lint_issues.suggestion: Add if b == 0: raise ValueError('division by zero') or check before call

structure_issues.message: DB_PASSWORD is assigned at module level but never referenced anywhere in the code
structure_issues.suggestion: Dead code — delete the line entirely (keeps hardcoded secrets out of source)

structure_issues.message: pickle.load() — unsafe deserialization (arbitrary code execution risk)
structure_issues.suggestion: Use json or other safe serialization formats
